turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hi , how are you doing ? i'm getting ready to do some cheetah chasing to stay in shape .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: you must be very fast . hunting is one of my favorite hobbies .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i am ! for my hobby i like to do canning or some whittling .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i also remodel homes when i am not out bow hunting .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: that's neat . when i was in high school i placed 6th in 100m dash !

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: that's awesome . do you have a favorite season or time of year ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i do not . but i do have a favorite meat since that is all i eat exclusively .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: what is your favorite meat to eat ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i would have to say its prime rib . do you have any favorite foods ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i like chicken or macaroni and cheese .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: do you have anything planned for today ? i think i am going to do some canning .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i am going to watch football . what are you canning ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i think i will can some jam . do you also play footfall for fun ?
